(Warning: these blocks may have significant changes during development that cause validation errors and display issues.)","group":"blocks","group_label":"Blocks"},"gutenberg-form-blocks":{"type":"boolean","title":"Form and input blocks","description":"Enables new blocks to allow building forms. You are likely to experience UX issues that are being addressed.","group":"blocks","group_label":"Blocks"},"gutenberg-grid-interactivity":{"type":"boolean","title":"Grid interactivity","description":"Enables enhancements to the Grid block that let you move and resize items in the editor canvas.","group":"blocks","group_label":"Blocks"},"gutenberg-classic-block-deprecation":{"type":"boolean","title":"Classic block deprecation","description":"Enables UI changes aimed at deprecating the block.","group":"blocks","group_label":"Blocks"},"gutenberg-media-editor":{"type":"boolean","title":"Media Editor (Route)","description":"Enables a dedicated route-based media editor screen for editing media items (metadata and content).","group":"media","group_label":"Media"},"gutenberg-dataviews-media-modal":{"type":"boolean","title":"Media Upload Modal","description":"Replaces the existing WordPress media modal with a new modal powered by Data Views, supporting browsing, selecting, and uploading media.","group":"media","group_label":"Media"},"gutenberg-content-only-inspector-fields":{"type":"boolean","title":"Block fields: Show dataform driven inspector fields on blocks that support Views"},"gutenberg-dataform-inspector":{"type":"boolean","title":"Editor Inspector: Use DataForm","description":"Replaces the bespoke editor inspector panels with a unified DataForm-based Views"},"gutenberg-full-page-client-side-navigation":{"type":"boolean","title":"Full-page client-side navigation","description":"Enables full-page client-side navigation, powered by the Interactivity API.","group":"interactivity","group_label":"Interactivity"},"active_templates":{"type":"boolean","title":"Template Activation","description":"Allows multiple templates of the same type to be created, of which one can be active at a time. (Warning: when you deactivate this experiment, it is best to delete all created templates except for the active ones.)","group":"templates","group_label":"Templates","separate_option":true,"option_name":"active_templates"},"gutenberg-color-randomizer":{"type":"boolean","title":"Color randomizer","description":"Enables the Global Styles color randomizer in the Site Editor; a utility that lets you mix the current color palette pseudo-randomly.","group":"other","group_label":"Other"},"gutenberg-workflow-palette":{"type":"boolean","title":"Workflow Palette","description":"Enables the Workflow Palette for running workflows composed of abilities, from a unified interface.","group":"other","group_label":"Other"},"gutenberg-extensible-site-editor":{"type":"boolean","title":"Extensible Site Editor","description":"Redirects the default site editor (Appearance > Design) to use the extensible site editor page.","group":"other","group_label":"Other"},"gutenberg-guidelines":{"type":"boolean","title":"Guidelines","description":"Enables guidelines feature for managing editorial voice and tone guidelines under Settings.","group":"other","group_label":"Other"},"gutenberg-content-types":{"type":"boolean","title":"Content types","description":"Enables a UI for creating and managing custom taxonomies and custom post types under Settings.","group":"other","group_label":"Other"},"gutenberg-dashboard-widgets":{"type":"boolean","title":"New Dashboard experience","description":"Enables a new dashboard +      "rendered": "\n<div style=\"position: relative; width: 100%; max-width: 900px; margin: 40px auto; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 6px;\">\n  <canvas id=\"waveCanvas\" style=\"width: 100%; height: auto; display: block;\"></canvas>\n</div>\n\n<script>\n// ================Is this real ?=====================\nconst canvas = document.getElementById('waveCanvas');\nconst ctx = canvas.getContext('2d', { alpha: true });\n\nlet img = new Image();\nimg.src = \"https://iili.io/CFCOYml.jpg\";\n\nlet time = 0;\nconst padding = 35;\n\nimg.onload = () => {\n  canvas.width = img.width;\n  canvas.height = img.height;\n  \n  // Wave\n  window.slices = [];\n  let x = 0;\n  while (x < canvas.width) {\n    const width = 28 + Math.random() * 58; // entre 28px et 86px\n    window.slices.push({ x: x, width: Math.min(width, canvas.width - x) });\n    x += width;\n  }\n  \n  animate();\n};\n\nfunction animate() {\n  time += 0.017;\n\n  ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);\n\n  window.slices.forEach((slice, i) => {\n    const waveY = Math.sin(time * 1.1 + i * 0.7) * 13;\n    const waveX = Math.cos(time * 0.8 + i * 0.5) * 4.5;\n\n    ctx.save();\n    ctx.beginPath();\n    ctx.rect(slice.x + waveX, padding, slice.width, canvas.height - padding * 2);\n    ctx.clip();\n\n    ctx.drawImage(\n      img,\n      slice.x, 0, slice.width, canvas.height,\n      slice.x + waveX, waveY, slice.width, canvas.height\n    );\n    ctx.restore();\n  });\n\n  ctx.fillStyle = \"rgba(12, 12, 28, 0.07)\";\n  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);\n\n  requestAnimationFrame(animate);\n}\n</script>\n",

+    },

+    "rendered": "Report: LONDON"

+  "content": {

+    "rendered": "\n<div style=\"position: relative; width: 100%; max-width: 900px; margin: 40px auto; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 6px;\">\n  <canvas id=\"waveCanvas\" style=\"width: 100%; height: auto; display: block;\"></canvas>\n</div>\n\n<script>\n// ================Is this real ?=====================\nconst canvas = document.getElementById('waveCanvas');\nconst ctx = canvas.getContext('2d', { alpha: true });\n\nlet img = new Image();\nimg.src = \"https://iili.io/CFCOYml.jpg\";\n\nlet time = 0;\nconst padding = 35;\n\nimg.onload = () => {\n  canvas.width = img.width;\n  canvas.height = img.height;\n  \n  // Wave\n  window.slices = [];\n  let x = 0;\n  while (x < canvas.width) {\n    const width = 28 + Math.random() * 58; // entre 28px et 86px\n    window.slices.push({ x: x, width: Math.min(width, canvas.width - x) });\n    x += width;\n  }\n  \n  animate();\n};\n\nfunction animate() {\n  time += 0.017;\n\n  ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);\n\n  window.slices.forEach((slice, i) => {\n    const waveY = Math.sin(time * 1.1 + i * 0.7) * 13;\n    const waveX = Math.cos(time * 0.8 + i * 0.5) * 4.5;\n\n    ctx.save();\n    ctx.beginPath();\n    ctx.rect(slice.x + waveX, padding, slice.width, canvas.height - padding * 2);\n    ctx.clip();\n\n    ctx.drawImage(\n      img,\n      slice.x, 0, slice.width, canvas.height,\n      slice.x + waveX, waveY, slice.width, canvas.height\n    );\n    ctx.restore();\n  });\n\n  ctx.fillStyle = \"rgba(12, 12, 28, 0.07)\";\n  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);\n\n  requestAnimationFrame(animate);\n}\n</script>\n",

+    "protected": false

+  },

+  "excerpt": {

+    "rendered": "",

+    "protected": false

+  },

-      "rendered": "\n<div class=\"wp-block-group has-global-padding is-layout-constrained wp-block-group-is-layout-constrained\">\n<p class=\"wp-block-paragraph\">memory bloc 1779708960:<br></p>\n\n\n\n<a href=\"https://project-skyscraper.com/?p=281\" class=\"scramble-text glitch-link\" data-word=\"Connection detected : Access denied\">Connection detected : Access denied</a><br>\n<a href=\"https://project-skyscraper.com/?p=281\" class=\"scramble-text glitch-link\" data-word=\"CONNECTION DETECTED : ACCESS DENIED\">CONNECTION DETECTED : ACCESS DENIED</a><br>\n<a href=\"https://project-skyscraper.com/?p=281\" class=\"scramble-text glitch-link\" data-word=\"Connection detected : Access denied\">connection detected : access denied</a><br>\n<a href=\"https://project-skyscraper.com/?p=281\" class=\"scramble-text glitch-link\" data-word=\"Connection detected : Access denied\">Connection Detected : Access Denied</a>\n\n<script>\nfunction scrambleWord(el) {\n    const original = el.dataset.word;\n    let letters = original.split('');\n    for (let i = letters.length - 1; i > 0; i--) {\n        const j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1));\n        [letters[i], letters[j]] = [letters[j], letters[i]];\n    }\n    el.textContent = letters.join('');\n}\n\ndocument.querySelectorAll('.scramble-text').forEach(el => {\n    scrambleWord(el);\n    setInterval(() => scrambleWord(el), 1000);\n});\n</script>\n</div>\n",
+      "rendered": "\n<p class=\"wp-block-paragraph\">memory bloc 1779907824<br><br>System: Core<br><br>Status: SECURITY_PROTOCOL_FAILURE<br>Module: System Filtering Platform<br>Alert: CRITICAL_LOOP_DETECTED<br><br>Details:<br>Security protocol has become unstable. <br>No reboot sequence has been scheduled yet.<br><br>Warning: Reboot sequence will render all protection layers inactive for approximately 960 seconds. <br>System will be highly vulnerable during this window.</p>\n",
       "protected": false
     },

-      "rendered": "<p>memory bloc : Connection detected : Access denied CONNECTION DETECTED : ACCESS DENIED connection detected : access denied Connection Detected : Access Denied</p>\n",
